target.title: refactor: route transcript writers through session seam
target.body:
## What

Path 3 / PR 3.1b transcript writers routes the core transcript writer/append/update helpers through the session accessor seam while preserving the current file-backed transcript behavior. Refs #88838.

## Why

This keeps caller modernization separated from the later SQLite storage flip so the file-backed runtime remains canonical until the 3.1a seam and downstream slices are ready.

## Changes

- Add transcript writer methods to the session accessor
- Route assistant, user, gateway, and command transcript writes
- Preserve lock, idempotency, and event-update behavior
- Cover the writer seam and updated callers in tests

## Testing

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/sessions/session-manager.test.ts src/sessions/input-provenance.test.ts src/sessions/user-turn-transcript.test.ts` passed 3 shards / 71 tests on final rebase.
- `node scripts/check-session-accessor-boundary.mjs && node --import tsx scripts/check-import-cycles.ts && node --import tsx scripts/check-madge-import-cycles.ts` passed.
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs` on touched transcript/session files passed.
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json && git diff --check` passed.
- `node scripts/check-deprecated-api-usage.mjs && node scripts/check-deprecated-jsdoc.mjs && node scripts/check-database-first-legacy-stores.mjs` passed.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main` reported no accepted/actionable findings.

Known unrelated local guard: `node scripts/generate-kysely-types.mjs --verify && node scripts/check-kysely-guardrails.mjs` fails on `src/agents/auth-profiles/sqlite.ts:103`, which is unchanged by this PR.

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior or issue addressed: Transcript writer paths for assistant/user turns and gateway-injected chat messages now route through the session accessor seam while preserving file-backed transcript writes.
- Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout at PR head `1f1b875f57c9e89d04a39baabfc420b2c092e251` loaded into `~/Projects/clawdbot`; macOS 15.6.1 arm64; Node 24.15.0; local Gateway LaunchAgent restarted and reachable at `ws://127.0.0.1:18789`; default `main` agent using OpenAI `gpt-5.5`.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch:
  1. `git fetch upstream clawdbot-d08/31b-transcript-writer-seam && git checkout --detach 1f1b875f57c9e89d04a39baabfc420b2c092e251`
  2. `pnpm openclaw gateway restart && pnpm openclaw status`
  3. `pnpm openclaw agent --session-key agent:main:pr89123-real-proof-1f1b875f-20260615-1740 --message "Real behavior proof for PR 89123 final SHA 1f1b875f. Reply with exactly: PR89123 final rebased transcript writer seam live proof OK" --timeout 300 --json`
  4. `pnpm openclaw gateway call chat.inject --json --timeout 30000 --params '{"sessionKey":"agent:main:pr89123-real-proof-1f1b875f-20260615-1740","agentId":"main","message":"PR89123 final rebased gateway injected transcript writer live proof OK","label":"PR89123 final rebased proof"}'`
  5. Read `~/.openclaw/agents/main/sessions/sessions.json`, then parsed the resolved session JSONL transcript file for the proof strings.
- Evidence after fix (screenshot, recording, terminal capture, console output, redacted runtime log, linked artifact, or copied live output): Copied live terminal output from the restarted local Gateway and session transcript inspection:

  ```text
  OpenClaw status
  Git                  git · @ 1f1b875f
  Gateway              local · ws://127.0.0.1:18789 (local loopback) · reachable 49ms
  Gateway service      LaunchAgent installed · loaded · running (pid 32268)

  pnpm openclaw agent ... --json
  {
    "runId": "aa863d76-a809-4039-a4d6-3d8a42a25259",
    "status": "ok",
    "summary": "completed",
    "result": {
      "payloads": [
        {
          "text": "PR89123 final rebased transcript writer seam live proof OK",
          "mediaUrl": null
        }
      ],
      "meta": {
        "agentMeta": {
          "sessionId": "e65c783f-4f8b-4a3f-a7e8-68f572f97f55",
          "sessionFile": "/Users/phaedrus/.openclaw/agents/main/sessions/e65c783f-4f8b-4a3f-a7e8-68f572f97f55.jsonl",
          "provider": "openai",
          "model": "gpt-5.5"
        }
      }
    }
  }

  pnpm openclaw gateway call chat.inject ...
  {
    "ok": true,
    "messageId": "97762e26-9fde-426c-8405-90d5d7dc1ec3"
  }

  JSONL transcript inspection for agent:main:pr89123-real-proof-1f1b875f-20260615-1740:
  line 5 role=user text="Real behavior proof for PR 89123 final SHA 1f1b875f. Reply with exactly: PR89123 final rebased transcript writer seam live proof OK"
  line 6 role=assistant text="PR89123 final rebased transcript writer seam live proof OK"
  line 7 role=assistant text="[PR89123 final rebased proof]\n\nPR89123 final rebased gateway injected transcript writer live proof OK"
  ```
- Observed result after fix: The real local Gateway restarted on the PR head, a live agent run completed successfully, the gateway-injected chat message returned `ok: true`, and both writer paths persisted the expected messages into the resolved session JSONL transcript file.
- What was not tested: Full release, Docker, cross-OS, and channel delivery suites were not run for this narrow transcript-writer seam refresh.
- Proof limitations or environment constraints: This proof used the local source checkout and local LaunchAgent Gateway, not a packaged install. Status output included preexisting local warnings about a legacy state-dir symlink, a disabled `active-memory` plugin config entry, and an already archived migrated plugin install index; none blocked the Gateway or transcript proof.
target.author: jalehman
